title: Gen Z is SAVING Hollywood and is OFFENDED by Scary Movie 6?!
description:
The Hollywood Reporter is out here claiming Gen Z is “saving Hollywood” because they’re suddenly going to the movies more than they used to. Clownfish TV breaks down the obvious: they’re young, they finally have cars, jobs, and freedom, and going out is what people their age have always done. Then the same article turns around and acts shocked that people are offended by the new Scary Movie 6 trailer — except the loudest complainers throwing a fit aren’t Gen Z at all. It’s the same old millennials who can’t handle a joke anymore. We show why this “Gen Z saves everything” narrative is pure media cope and how the outrage machine always finds a new target.

Watch the podcast episodes on YouTube and all major podcast hosts including Spotify.

CLOWNFISH TV is an independent, opinionated news and commentary podcast that covers Entertainment and Tech from a consumer’s point of view. We talk about Gaming, Comics, Anime, TV, Movies, Animation and more. Hosted by Kneon and Geeky Sparkles.
